<!--
  Adding a theme to the gallery? Thank you! Fill this in and open the PR.
  (To use this template, add ?template=theme.md to the PR's "compare" URL.)
  See themes/README.md for the full guide.
-->

## New theme: <!-- your theme's name -->

**Slug:** `<!-- themes/<slug>.yaml -->`
**Mode:** <!-- light / dark -->

### Checklist

- [ ] One file added: `themes/<slug>.yaml` (and nothing else)
- [ ] `author` (and ideally `authorUrl`) filled in — you'll be credited in the footer
- [ ] `license` chosen (default `CC-BY-4.0`, which keeps your credit required)
- [ ] Ran `pnpm run gen:themes` locally with no errors
- [ ] Ran `pnpm run check-contrast` — passes WCAG AA
- [ ] This theme is my own work (or I've credited the original in `description`/`tags`)

<!-- CI will validate the file, check contrast, and attach a rendered preview. -->
